visibilityRule.booleanFilter: 1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10
1 AND 2 AND (3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7)

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: This Account is a Similarweb supplier, reach out to procurement-support@similarweb.com for more details on the commercial relationship

visibilityRule.booleanFilter: 1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10
1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7
